code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test28-DEC-2017Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, indicating possible impaired renal function. Urinalysis reveals significant proteinuria, glucosuria, bilirubinuria, ketonuria, low specific gravity, and abnormal urine appearance and color, suggesting renal tubular dysfunction or possible nephrotic syndrome. HbA1c is low, which may reflect recent hypoglycemia or anemia. Further nephrological evaluation and clinical correlation are recommended.
